meta.defaultDescription: Independent microbiological and physicochemical food and water analysis laboratory in Prizren, Kosovo.

hero.title: Food safety,
hero.titleAccent: spoken in the language of science.
hero.subtitle: Microbiological and physicochemical analyses for food, drinking water and wastewater — for producers and the food industry in Kosovo and the Balkans.

services.title: What we analyse
services.subtitle: Two core domains with validated methods and calibrated equipment.

chem.title: Physicochemical Analyses
chem.subtitle: Composition, water quality and nutritional parameters

accuracy.title: Scientific accuracy
accuracy.desc: Validated methods, calibrated equipment and quality control at every step.

speed.title: Fast reporting
speed.desc: Microbiology and physicochemical analyses delivered within validated turnaround times.

privacy.title: Confidentiality
privacy.desc: Customer data and results are kept per ISO/IEC 17025 §4.2 principles.

transparency.title: Transparent process
transparency.desc: Each sample receives a unique tracking code — follow status online.

showcase.title: From sample to result — an analysis journey
showcase.subtitle: Each scene reveals one step from inside the lab.

patogens.title: Pathogen detection
patogens.desc: Salmonella, Listeria and E. coli are identified with ISO-based methods, with preliminary results within 24–72 hours.

chemistry.title: Precise chemical analysis
chemistry.desc: HPLC, GC-MS and ICP-MS detect residues and additives at trace levels — calibrated routinely, with duplicate readings.

reporting.title: Professional signed report
reporting.desc: A PDF report, ready for audit and inspection, is delivered within 5–10 working days.

process.title: From sample to report — transparent process
process.subtitle: Every step is logged, traceable and inspection-ready.

step1.title: Sample intake
step1.desc: The sample arrives at the lab, is barcoded, registered and verified together with documents.

step2.title: Preparation
step2.desc: The team prepares the sample for the selected method — homogenisation, filtration, conditioning.

step3.title: Analysis
step3.desc: Tests are run with validated methods on calibrated equipment, with parallel controls.

step4.title: Verification
step4.desc: Results are double-checked by technical staff — deviations are re-run.

step5.title: Reporting
step5.desc: A signed PDF report is uploaded to our system; you retrieve it with your sample code.

accreditation.title: Our accreditation journey
accreditation.body: LaboraFood is in the process of accreditation by the Kosovo Accreditation Directorate (DAK), under the international standard ISO/IEC 17025:2017. Our quality management system has been built around these principles from day one.
accreditation.honestyNote: We don't claim accreditation we don't have — here's exactly where we are.

compliance.title: We work within regulatory frameworks
compliance.subtitle: Our methodology respects Kosovo and EU regulations.

auv.title: AUV — Food and Veterinary Agency
auv.desc: Compliance with Kosovo national regulations on food safety.

eu178.title: EU Regulation 178/2002
eu178.desc: General principles and requirements of European food law.

skeniso.title: SK EN ISO — Kosovo Standards
skeniso.desc: Our methodology is grounded in Kosovo standards and international ISO standards.

trackingCta.title: Do you have a sample at the lab?
trackingCta.subtitle: Enter the tracking code and view the current analysis status.

tracking.title: Track your sample
tracking.subtitle: Enter your sample code (e.g. LF-2026-0123) to see the current status.

errors.notFound: No sample found for this code.

blogSection.title: From the lab
blogSection.subtitle: Methods, regulations and notes from the field — for producers.

cta.title: Do you have a sample for analysis?
cta.subtitle: Get a quote in 5 minutes — reply within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Independent food analysis laboratory in Kosovo.

about.title: Science,
about.intro: LaboraFood is an independent food analysis laboratory based in Prizren. We work with producers and the food industry to ensure safety, quality and regulatory compliance.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Deliver accurate, fast and transparent analyses that protect consumer health and brand trust.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: Become the most trusted food laboratory in Kosovo and the region — a reference for accuracy and professionalism.

values.title: Values
values.body: Scientific honesty, customer closeness, continuous improvement — impartial results always come first.

facility.title: Our laboratory
facility.subtitle: Dedicated areas for microbiology and physicochemical analyses, with sample-flow separation.

servicesPage.title: Two domains,
servicesPage.subtitle: Methods across microbiology and physicochemical analyses, for food, drinking water and wastewater.

analysesPage.title: All analyses
analysesPage.subtitle: Filter by domain or search by analysis name.

accreditationPage.title: The whole process,
accreditationPage.subtitle: LaboraFood is in the accreditation process with the Kosovo Accreditation Directorate (DAK), per ISO/IEC 17025:2017.

contactPage.title: Let's talk
contactPage.subtitle: Have a quick question, need consulting or want a site visit? Fill out the form or contact us directly.
